geometry_strategy: Master empty and optional transparent ellipsoid guide for animal cell boundary, scaled about X=20 Y=14 Z=9.
biological_function: Defines whole-cell context so the nucleus is one organelle inside a larger animal cell.
animation_function: Parent all whole-cell context assets; optional cell idle sway.
integration_points: Parent of cytoplasm and nucleus socket; not a heavy exported mesh unless needed.
pivot_origin: Origin at world center.
roblox_export_note: Can be a non-export guide or transparent shell for Roblox scene context.
pass_criteria: Cell boundary is visible but does not obscure the nucleus.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Cell_Context_RootRig` as the scene-level parent. Add a transparent ellipsoid cell guide with very low opacity and a subtle rim highlight.

geometry_strategy: Semi-transparent ovoid volume inside the cell shell, with small low-poly suspended specks and soft motion curves.
biological_function: Shows cytoplasmic space where imported proteins originate and exported RNAs travel.
animation_function: Subtle particle drift; path markers for import/export pass through this volume.
integration_points: Wraps around the nucleus but leaves it readable.
pivot_origin: Origin at cell center.
roblox_export_note: Use low-poly transparent material; avoid dense volumetric rendering.
pass_criteria: Cytoplasm is visible from main camera but not visually dominant.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Cytoplasm_Volume` as a transparent blue ellipsoid volume around the nucleus. Add faint particle specks and flow curves; keep opacity low.

geometry_strategy: Small ring or target marker at the nucleus position with XYZ axes and a labeled socket.
biological_function: Defines assembly location of the nucleus inside the cell.
animation_function: All nucleus objects ultimately follow this socket for placement and repositioning.
integration_points: Parent `Nucleus_RootRig` to this socket or align it exactly.
pivot_origin: Origin at nucleus center `(0,0,0.2)`.
roblox_export_note: Useful as a Roblox attachment/primary part reference.
pass_criteria: Nucleus rotates and scales around this socket correctly.
blender_ai_prompt: Create a visible but hideable `NucleusSocket_Center` at the nucleus center with small XYZ arrows and a circular socket ring.

geometry_strategy: Simple low-detail mitochondria, Golgi, lysosome, peroxisome, and cytoskeleton silhouettes around the nucleus.
biological_function: Shows the nucleus as part of one cell ecosystem without overbuilding other organelles.
animation_function: Optional idle drift only.
integration_points: Keep outside nucleus and low opacity/detail.
pivot_origin: Origins at each object center.
roblox_export_note: Optional for Roblox; can be hidden for nucleus-only export.
pass_criteria: Secondary organelles do not compete with the nucleus.
blender_ai_prompt: Create optional low-detail surrounding organelles as contextual silhouettes only. Do not add more detail than the nucleus.

geometry_strategy: Empty at nucleus center with visible pivot sphere and axes.
biological_function: Master parent for all nucleus assets.
animation_function: Controls placement, scale, interphase, transport, mitosis, and reassembly animation groups.
integration_points: Child of NucleusSocket_Center; parent of all nucleus collections.
pivot_origin: Origin at nucleus center.
roblox_export_note: Use as Roblox PrimaryPart or root model pivot.
pass_criteria: Every nucleus component is under this root and rotates around the center.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Nucleus_RootRig` as an empty at `(0,0,0.2)`. Add a small white pivot sphere and red/green/blue axis arrows as hideable review geometry.

geometry_strategy: Front-left cutaway wedge guide, not necessarily exported.
biological_function: Controls which shell panels are removed or opened for viewing.
animation_function: Can drive visibility of cutaway caps and transparent review mode.
integration_points: Aligned with shell panels and review cameras.
pivot_origin: Origin at nucleus center.
roblox_export_note: Do not export if only used for Blender review.
pass_criteria: Cutaway reveals inside but keeps the nucleus recognizable as a sphere.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Nucleus_Cutaway_Controller` as a wedge-shaped guide or empty that marks the open viewing sector. Use it to name and organize cutaway panels.

geometry_strategy: Empty with custom properties for LOD0, LOD1, LOD2 visibility.
biological_function: Controls performance versions for Roblox export.
animation_function: Switches pore count, chromatin density, labels, and transparent volume details.
integration_points: Linked to all LOD groups and high-detail optional parts.
pivot_origin: Origin at nucleus center.
roblox_export_note: Use Roblox CollectionService tags if rebuilt in Roblox.
pass_criteria: Reviewer can toggle LOD levels cleanly.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Nucleus_LOD_Controller` with custom properties `LOD0_Hero`, `LOD1_Gameplay`, `LOD2_Distant`. Add notes as custom properties.

geometry_strategy: Defines target offsets for exploded assembly view.
biological_function: Helps AI/reviewer understand how components assemble.
animation_function: Keyframes pieces outward from center for assembly demo.
integration_points: Linked to membrane panels, NPCs, lamina, nucleoplasm, genome, nucleolus.
pivot_origin: Origin at nucleus center.
roblox_export_note: Do not export to final gameplay unless needed for teaching mode.
pass_criteria: Exploded view separates groups without losing relationships.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `Nucleus_ExplodedView_Controller` with child empties for each group offset. Add keyframes or drivers for a simple exploded view demo.

geometry_strategy: One of 8 thick outer nuclear membrane panels, radius about 3.2 BU, with rounded bevels and small pore sockets. Segment 1 aligns with matching inner panel and lumen band.
biological_function: Outer nuclear membrane; cytoplasmic-facing part of the double nuclear envelope.
animation_function: Splits outward during mitotic nuclear envelope breakdown; returns during reassembly.
integration_points: Align with `NE_InnerMembrane_Panel_01` and `NE_PerinuclearLumen_Segment_01`; contains NPC sockets.
pivot_origin: Origin at panel local center; transform should separate outward from nucleus center.
roblox_export_note: Export as separate mesh for mitosis panel animation.
pass_criteria: Panel has thickness, bevels, pore sockets, and does not merge with other panels.
blender_ai_prompt: Create `NE_OuterMembrane_Panel_01` as a thick curved spherical shell segment. Use purple satin material with procedural bump. Add shallow circular sockets for NPC placement and clean seams for animation.
